question_text:
Power of Two

Given an integer n, return true if it is a power of two. Otherwise, return false.
explanation: Bitwise mapping perfectly encapsulates powers of explicitly identical twos because their absolute binary footprint consists of exactly one strictly singular 1-bit natively. Modifying `n` via pure binary `n & (n - 1)` essentially definitively strips exactly the lowest operational 1-bit out smoothly returning 0 optimally immediately confirming its constraints.
